channel.title: My New Hugo Site
channel.description: Recent content on My New Hugo Site

item.title: Grammatica Latina 0.0
item.description: 0.1 Purposes of Learning Latin Language Although it’s an undeniable truth that Latin language itself has now become an heritage of time, men will still say the influence and the importance of Latin are inmeasureable. Latin served not only as the official language of Roman Empire, but also the official language of most of the nations in the Medieval era. Along with the language itself, many great works written in Latin also left for us to read, and to research; for example, Seneca’s Naturales Questions, Iulius Caeser’s Bellum Gallicum, or even the Bible.

item.title: About Hugo
item.description: Hugo is a static site engine written in Go. It makes use of a variety of open source projects including: Cobra Viper J Walter Weatherman Cast Learn more and contribute on GitHub. Setup Some fun facts about Hugo: Built in Go Loosely inspired by Jekyll Primarily developed by spf13 on the train while commuting to and from Manhattan. Coded in Vim using spf13-vim Have questions or suggestions? Feel free to open an issue on GitHub or ask me on Twitter.
